title: Lesbian Lotads
description: A cobblemon pack featuring Create, many Create addons, and futuristic tech
body:
A cobblemon based modpack featuring Create, Create addons, and future technology!

IMPORTANT:
You may need to remove some client-only mods from the server files if you are creating a multiplayer server. These mods will show up in server logs/crash reports and it should be relatively easy to figure out which mods are causing issues. Removing these mods will not impact gameplay or performance.
